jira.note: Users are assigned to site groups; groups are mapped to project roles. Refresh live: GET /rest/api/3/project/EPCE/role and GET /rest/api/3/user?accountId={id}&expand=groups.

confluence.note: Space access is group-based. Group names encode scope and level (-admins, -squaddie, -read-only). Retrieve via user group expand: GET /rest/api/3/user?accountId={id}&expand=groups.

ado.note: Not yet queried. Check via ADO REST: GET https://dev.azure.com/twoa/_apis/graph/groups.

salesforce.note: Not yet queried. Check via SOQL: SELECT Name, Profile.Name FROM User WHERE IsActive=true AND Email IN (...).

systemRoles._derivedFrom: Atlassian API live query 2026-05-27; ADO and Salesforce not yet queried

brett.alley@twoa.ac.nz.jira: project-role-admin + project-role-squaddie in EPCE (via jira-group-admin-epce, jira-group-squaddie-epce); site-wide admin via jira-admins-twoa
brett.alley@twoa.ac.nz.confluence: site-wide admin (confluence-admins-twoa); space admin on EPCE (confluence-group-epce-admins) and DTRAIN (confluence-group-dtrain-admins); SMART via site-wide admin only (no dedicated SMART admin group exists)

ajit.kuttikatte@twoa.ac.nz.jira: project-role-squaddie + project-role-read-only in EPCE (via jira-group-squaddie-epce, jira-group-read-only, jira-group-test-team)
ajit.kuttikatte@twoa.ac.nz.confluence: edit in EPCE, DTRAIN, and SMART (confluence-group-squaddie-epce covers all three approved spaces); read-only on other spaces (confluence-group-read-only)

levinson.aruja@twoa.ac.nz.jira: project-role-squaddie + project-role-read-only in EPCE (via jira-group-squaddie-epce, jira-group-read-only)
levinson.aruja@twoa.ac.nz.confluence: edit in EPCE, DTRAIN, and SMART (confluence-group-squaddie-epce covers all three approved spaces); read-only on other spaces (confluence-group-read-only)

daniel.mladek@twoa.ac.nz.jira: project-role-squaddie + project-role-read-only in EPCE (via jira-group-squaddie-epce, jira-group-read-only)
daniel.mladek@twoa.ac.nz.confluence: edit in EPCE, DTRAIN, and SMART (confluence-group-squaddie-epce covers all three approved spaces); read-only on other spaces (confluence-group-read-only)

notes: Central role assignments for TWoA consumer. Change roles via pull request — local profile allow* flags are ignored when roleEnforcement is enabled. The artifact role model is an additional policy layer above the native system permissions — those remain the last line of defence. See permissionModel for each system's access tiers and systemRoles for per-user native assignments.
